steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure needed
steps.content: The blank is the main verb of the independent clause “Cordeiro ______ the library's collections.” This verb must be finite (capable of functioning as the main verb of a clause) and in present tense to match the context of her current role.

steps.title: Apply the rule and select the correct form
steps.content: An independent clause requires a finite main verb. Choice B (oversees) is the only finite form, in simple present tense. The other choices are non-finite verb forms—participles and an infinitive—that cannot function as a clause's main verb. This matches choice B — B is correct.
